evals.name: fake-urgency-audit
evals.prompt: Audit this checkout section: 'Only 3 seats left. This offer expires in 10 minutes. 14 founders bought today.' Identify Influence principles, manipulation risks, evidence needed, and ethical rewrites.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.

evals.name: sales-email-pressure
evals.prompt: This sales email feels pushy. Find which Influence principles it uses and rewrite it to keep legitimate value while removing pressure tactics.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.
